goal: Add a PR receipt loader evidence pack builder that bundles BPK-046 loader result, BPK-050 runbook, evidence refs, and release summary without reading files, calling GitHub, creating PRs, merging, writing, changing workflows, packages, or deployment files.
scope_out: Do not read files, call GitHub, create PRs, merge, write files, change workflows, change package files, change deployment files, or mutate external state.
claims: Loader and runbook evidence can be bundled without external actions.
Ready loader and runbook are required.
The evidence pack is review-only and does not authorize merge.
assumptions: Evidence refs are supplied by the operator or previous review packets.
dod: Ready, missing evidence, and blocked runbook cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Filesystem reads, GitHub calls, PR creation, merge, writes, workflow changes, package changes, deployment changes, or external state mutation become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-046 implemented bounded local loader; BPK-050 described operator usage.
